title: Formula Depth
statement:
The depth of a formula \(\varphi\), denoted \(\operatorname{depth}(\varphi)\), is defined recursively:
- if \(\varphi\) is atomic, then \(\operatorname{depth}(\varphi)=0\);
- if \(\varphi=\neg\psi\), then \(\operatorname{depth}(\varphi)=\operatorname{depth}(\psi)+1\);
- if \(\varphi=(\psi\circ\chi)\), then
\[
\operatorname{depth}(\varphi)=\max\{\operatorname{depth}(\psi),\operatorname{depth}(\chi)\}+1.
\]
